title: [Bug]: `union all` 不同的类型时，`to_base64(NULL)` 有时会得到错误的结果
description: master分支版本，`union all` 不同的类型时，`to_base64(NULL)` 有时会得到错误的结果
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, data BLOB, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, data) VALUES (1, 'test1', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, data) VALUES (2, 'test2', 'c2FtcGxlIGRhdGE=');

SELECT CASE WHEN data IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'NOT NULL' END AS base64_null FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN data IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'NOT NULL' END FROM test_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL) UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS id, NULL AS name, NULL AS data;
key_bug_features: `union all` with different types causing `to_base64(NULL)` error
